nodes.title: PBE self-dogfooding documentation slice
nodes.why: The PBE repo should demonstrate improving itself through a small PBE-modeled slice.
nodes.acceptanceNotRequiredReason: Root groups the selected documentation capability.

nodes.title: Sequential local verification guidance
nodes.summary: Users should know to run local verification commands sequentially, especially on Windows, to avoid clean-dist file locking errors.
nodes.why: A parallel validate:pbe and test:examples run produced a Windows EPERM around clean-dist, while sequential reruns passed.

acceptanceCriteria.condition: A user reads local install verification instructions
acceptanceCriteria.shall: SHALL tell the user to run verification commands sequentially rather than in parallel
acceptanceCriteria.expectedBehavior: The instructions tell the user to run verification commands sequentially rather than in parallel.
acceptanceCriteria.observableResult: docs/install.md includes a sequential execution note near the verification command block.
acceptanceCriteria.statement: WHEN a user reads local install verification instructions, THE DOCUMENTATION SHALL tell the user to run verification commands sequentially rather than in parallel.

acceptanceCriteria.condition: A Windows user sees an EPERM error involving clean-dist during validation
acceptanceCriteria.shall: SHALL explain that parallel validation commands may race on clean-dist and should be rerun sequentially
acceptanceCriteria.expectedBehavior: The troubleshooting guide explains that parallel validation commands may race on clean-dist and should be rerun sequentially.
acceptanceCriteria.observableResult: docs/troubleshooting.md includes a clean-dist EPERM troubleshooting entry.
acceptanceCriteria.statement: WHEN a Windows user sees an EPERM error involving clean-dist during validation, THE DOCUMENTATION SHALL explain that parallel validation commands may race on clean-dist and should be rerun sequentially.

acceptanceCriteria.condition: A user reads the CLI reference overview
acceptanceCriteria.shall: SHALL include a short sequential local verification note
acceptanceCriteria.expectedBehavior: The CLI reference points users toward sequential local verification on Windows.
acceptanceCriteria.observableResult: docs/cli-reference.md includes a short sequential verification note.
acceptanceCriteria.statement: WHEN a user reads the CLI reference overview, THE DOCUMENTATION SHALL include a short sequential local verification note.

assumptions.text: This self-dogfooding slice is docs-only and excludes code/script/CI fixes.
